name: attune-app
description: Desktop control panel for the Attune live CSS runtime

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build && npm run build:electron
scripts.dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:5173 && ATTUNE_APP_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
